headline: Colgate-Palmolive Announces Webcast of its 2026 First Quarter Earnings Conference Call May 1, 2026 - Now at 8:00 a.m. ET and its 2026 Annual Meeting of Stockholders on May 8, 2026 at 10:00 a.m. ET
summary: NEW YORK, April 27, 2026--Due to a scheduling conflict, Colgate-Palmolive Company (NYSE:CL) will now provide a live webcast of its 2026 first quarter earnings conference call on Friday, May 1, 2026, at 8:00 a.m. ET (previously 8:30 a.m. ET). The call will be hosted by Chairman, President and CEO, Noel Wallace, Chief Financial Officer, Stan Sutula, Executive Vice President, Investor Relations, Claire Ross, and Executive Vice President, M&A and Special Projects, John Faucher. Investors may access

headline: Colgate's Q1 Earnings Upcoming: Here's What Investors Should Know
summary: CL eyes Q1 growth with rising sales and EPS, but cost pressures and weak volumes may limit upside despite innovation and premium push.

headline: Gulf countries facing plunge as conflict disrupts energy markets, Reuters says
summary: Investing.com -- Gulf Cooperation Council (GCC) economies are facing their steepest downturn since the pandemic, as the U.S.-Israel conflict with Iran disrupts energy markets and regional stability, according to a Reuters poll.
